engageExtra.quickSignupDesc: Password-free alternative — manually validated by CFM team.

engageExtra.annualReport: Annual report available on request from the admin team.

engageExtra.prodPayment: Secure payment via PayDunya (Orange Money, M-Pesa, Airtel).
engageExtra.sandboxPayment: Test mode: payment through the PayDunya sandbox, no real charge.

famille.label: Military family
famille.description: For spouses, children, widows and orphans of military personnel. Family link information required.
